response.global_summary: A video featuring a 3D performance of the song "さくら" (Sakura) by Inugami Korone and Nekomata Okayu. The performance begins after a brief introductory segment.

scenes.description: Introductory segment showing the performers, Inugami Korone and Nekomata Okayu, in a stage setting. No vocal music is playing.
The song 'さくら' (Sakura) by Ketsumeishi is performed by Inugami Korone and Nekomata Okayu. They sing and dance against a backdrop of a cherry blossom tree.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
In the falling cherry blossoms, forgotten memories and your voice come back to me
The spring wind that won't stop blowing, just as it was back then
The pale scent of your hair when you brushed it in the wind will come back to me
Just as we were back then, when we made a promise
Hyururiira hyururiira...
Sakura starts to fall... without meaning...
I'm thinking about those days again
The same scent, the same scenery, the same wind
The only difference is you're not here
Standing here revives memories, I read them over and over again
Long hair dancing in the spring breeze, fussing over trivial things again
Right under the cherry blossom tree, we talked and talked
Memories are proof that I've shined
When the cherry blossoms are falling, we met and parted
And yet, here I am, still the same
The buds that bloomed, you, the hand that we parted
We parted before I knew it, we crossed paths...
In the season of dancing cherry blossoms, I'll take it back
And I recall those days, and you
Petals are falling. Memories are coming back.
I find myself in this season again, lured by memories of you
I opened the door of my heart, but the petals slipped through my hand
I realized for the first time that I was young
I didn't understand until I came to this place
But this is the only place where I still don't know why. The wind that smells like destiny.
I close my eyes and I can go back to that day
Someday you'll be gone... somewhere.
The scenery hasn't changed since that day.
The falling petals don't speak
Your voice echoed beneath the cherry blossoms.
In the falling cherry blossoms, forgotten memories and your voice come back to me
The spring wind that won't stop blowing, just as it was back then
The pale scent of your hair when you brushed it in the wind will come back to me
Just as we were back then, when we made a promise
Hyururiira hyururiira...
A petal of a flower gently falls on my shoulder
I take it in my hand and close my eyes, you're beside me
In the falling cherry blossoms, forgotten memories and your voice come back to me
The spring wind that won't stop blowing, just as it was back then
The pale scent of your hair when you brushed it in the wind will come back to me
Just as we were back then, when we made a promise
Hyururiira hyururiira...
Petals are falling. Memories are coming back.
Petals are falling down.
